selected_important_turn.text: Haha yup me too. I have a teenage son who eats about 5000 calories a day. Okay, I think the most fair option is one of takes 2 firewood and 1 of the other two items. I don't care who.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first concrete proposal from YOU that shapes the eventual division of scarce resources (firewood). It moves the negotiation from information exchange into deal-making and therefore strongly influences who ends up with the items.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The proposal is vague about which of the 'other two items' should go to whom and includes 'I don't care who,' which misses a chance to match allocation to revealed preferences (THEM later says food is their second priority). By not specifying or recommending an allocation that gives the opponent their higher-valued item (food), YOU missed an opportunity to create a clearer, fairer, and more robust deal.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Rather than staying intentionally neutral, explicitly propose which party gets which secondary item (or present two conditional, preference-aligned options). Use the opponent's revealed ranking (food second) to offer them the food while taking the water (or propose swapping if they value food more). Also briefly signal flexibility/tradeoffs (e.g., "I'm fine taking the water if you want the food") to make the trade explicit.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — specifying allocation that matches each party's preferences reduces wasted value and the risk of later renegotiation
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — aligning items with the other party's second priority would feel fairer to them and reflect their needs
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — concrete, preference-aware proposals reduce ambiguity and speed acceptance
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: increase — showing you considered the opponent's priorities builds goodwill and trust

value2reason.Low: I need extra water to make drinks for my guests
value2reason.Medium: I am hosting a party for many guests
value2reason.High: I am making a big bonfire and need extra wood.

value2reason.Low: We brought more water than we need.
value2reason.Medium: I have a teenage son who eats alot.

dialogue.text: I'm looking forward to my camping trip! What are you trying to collect for your trip?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Me too! It will be great to finally get out of town for a few days. I mostly need more firewood to keep the wife nice and toasty. How about you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: oh it turns out I need firewood too!🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Ha what a surprise! ;-) What do you need second most?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need food to feed all my friends that are coming up. how about you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Haha yup me too. I have a teenage son who eats about 5000 calories a day. Okay, I think the most fair option is one of takes 2 firewood and 1 of the other two items. I don't care who.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for firewood, but I'm really focused on getting enough food for my guests. How about we split the firewood 2-1, and then I take all the food? That way we both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm fine taking the water if you want the food. That way you get your priority, and I can still take the firewood. Let's split the firewood 2-1, with you taking 2 and me taking 1. Then you take all the food, and I'll take the water.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That sounds fair. I’ll take 2 firewood, all the food, and you can have the water. Let’s confirm the split: 2 firewood, 3 food, and 3 water. Is that okay with you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm fine with that split. Let's confirm: you get 2 firewood, 3 food, and I take the 3 water. That works for me.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Great, deal confirmed! Let's enjoy our camping trip with the agreed supplies.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
